message:
feat(stdlib): Complete stdlib implementations for CPython test compatibility

- os.zig: Add full stat_result (st_ino, st_dev, st_nlink, st_uid, st_gid,
  st_atime_ns, st_mtime_ns, st_ctime_ns, st_blocks, st_blksize, st_rdev),
  lstat, fstat, and walk() with WalkIterator
- itertools.zig: Add groupby(), starmap(), batched() (Python 3.12+)
- functools.zig: Add wraps(), WrapsDecorator, update_wrapper,
  singledispatch, WRAPPER_ASSIGNMENTS, WRAPPER_UPDATES
- test/support.zig: Full implementation with cpython_only, requires_IEEE_754,
  assert_python_ok, check_warnings, bigmemtest, INF/NINF/NAN constants
